results.device_name: 2009 H1n1 Influenza Virus (Swine Origin), Nucleic Acid Or Antigen, Detection And Identification
results.definition: 2009 H1N1 influenza virus detection and identification reagents are used to directly detect and differentiate the 2009 H1N1 influenza virus in human respiratory specimens
